CustomField.description: The sales motion that produced this Order (New Logo, Expansion, Renewal, Services Only, Partner Sourced). Backed by Northstar_Sales_Motion GVS. Mirrored from the source Opportunity at Order creation; immutable thereafter so Order-level reporting always reflects the original motion.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Locked sales motion for this Order — mirrors the source Opportunity.
CustomField.label: Sales Motion
